> ­¤īÉ **English version:** [read this in English](en/analisis.qmd)

Halaman ini menunjukkan analisis nyata ŌĆö **dijalankan langsung dari data** ŌĆö untuk **R**
dan **Python**. Studi kasus: tingkat kemiskinan 35 kabupaten/kota di Jawa Tengah
(`data/data_kemiskinan_jateng.csv`). Salin kodenya dan jalankan di komputer Anda.


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(dplyr); library(ggplot2); library(knitr)
df <- read.csv("data/data_kemiskinan_jateng.csv")
df23 <- df[df$tahun == 2023, ]
```
:::


## 1. Statistik deskriptif

Ringkasan sebaran variabel: pemusatan (rata-rata, median) dan keragaman (simpangan baku,
rentang).

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
vars <- c("kemiskinan", "pdrb_kapita", "inflasi", "ipm")
ringkas <- data.frame(
  Variabel = vars,
  Rerata = sapply(df23[vars], mean), Median = sapply(df23[vars], median),
  SB = sapply(df23[vars], sd),
  Min = sapply(df23[vars], min), Maks = sapply(df23[vars], max))
kable(ringkas, digits = 2, row.names = FALSE)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}


|Variabel    | Rerata| Median|   SB|   Min|  Maks|
|:-----------|------:|------:|----:|-----:|-----:|
|kemiskinan  |  10.95|  10.64| 3.88|  4.65| 24.58|
|pdrb_kapita |  41.88|  41.05| 5.66| 31.63| 56.23|
|inflasi     |   2.69|   2.67| 0.46|  1.84|  3.52|
|ipm         |  79.39|  79.17| 1.92| 76.20| 85.10|


:::
:::

### Python

::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv("data/data_kemiskinan_jateng.csv")
df23 = df[df["tahun"] == 2023]
df23[["kemiskinan","pdrb_kapita","inflasi","ipm"]].describe().round(2)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
       kemiskinan  pdrb_kapita  inflasi    ipm
count       35.00        35.00    35.00  35.00
mean        10.95        41.88     2.69  79.39
std          3.88         5.66     0.46   1.92
min          4.65        31.63     1.84  76.20
25%          8.24        38.80     2.35  77.87
50%         10.64        41.05     2.67  79.17
75%         12.50        46.02     3.10  80.84
max         24.58        56.23     3.52  85.10
```


:::
:::

:::

## 2. Plotting

Visualisasi membantu memahami **sebaran** (histogram) dan **hubungan** (diagram pencar).

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
hist(df23$kemiskinan, breaks = 10, col = "#b03a2e", border = "white",
     main = "", xlab = "Kemiskinan (%)", ylab = "Jumlah daerah")
plot(df23$pdrb_kapita, df23$kemiskinan, pch = 19, col = "#2166ac",
     xlab = "PDRB per kapita (juta)", ylab = "Kemiskinan (%)")
abline(lm(kemiskinan ~ pdrb_kapita, data = df23), col = "#b03a2e", lwd = 2)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Sebaran kemiskinan (histogram) & hubungannya dengan PDRB per kapita, 2023](analisis_files/figure-html/plot-r-1.png){width=768}
:::
:::

### Python

::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
import numpy as np, matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(8, 3.2))
ax[0].hist(df23["kemiskinan"], bins=10, color="#b03a2e", edgecolor="white")
ax[0].set_xlabel("Kemiskinan (%)"); ax[0].set_ylabel("Jumlah daerah")
ax[1].scatter(df23["pdrb_kapita"], df23["kemiskinan"], color="#2166ac")
m, b = np.polyfit(df23["pdrb_kapita"], df23["kemiskinan"], 1)
ax[1].plot(df23["pdrb_kapita"], m*df23["pdrb_kapita"] + b, color="#b03a2e")
ax[1].set_xlabel("PDRB per kapita (juta)"); ax[1].set_ylabel("Kemiskinan (%)")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Sebaran kemiskinan (histogram) & hubungannya dengan PDRB per kapita, 2023](analisis_files/figure-html/plot-py-1.png){width=768}
:::
:::

:::

## 3. Regresi linear berganda

Memodelkan kemiskinan sebagai fungsi beberapa variabel bebas. Perhatikan **tanda
koefisien** (arah pengaruh), **p-value** (signifikansi), dan **R┬▓** (daya jelas model).
Pakai **data panel 2019ŌĆō2023** (175 observasi).

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
model <- lm(kemiskinan ~ pdrb_kapita + inflasi + ipm + pengangguran, data = df)
koef <- summary(model)$coefficients[, c("Estimate", "Pr(>|t|)")]
rownames(koef) <- c("Konstanta","PDRB per kapita","Inflasi","IPM","Pengangguran")
kable(koef, col.names = c("Koefisien", "p-value"), digits = 3)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}


|                | Koefisien| p-value|
|:---------------|---------:|-------:|
|Konstanta       |    39.795|   0.002|
|PDRB per kapita |     0.042|   0.471|
|Inflasi         |     0.004|   0.983|
|IPM             |    -0.408|   0.018|
|Pengangguran    |     0.323|   0.076|


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
cat(sprintf("R-squared = %.3f", summary(model)$r.squared))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
R-squared = 0.055
```


:::
:::

### Python

::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf
model = smf.ols("kemiskinan ~ pdrb_kapita + inflasi + ipm + pengangguran", data=df).fit()
koef = pd.DataFrame({"Koefisien": model.params, "p-value": model.pvalues}).round(3)
koef.index = ["Konstanta","PDRB per kapita","Inflasi","IPM","Pengangguran"]
print(koef)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
                 Koefisien  p-value
Konstanta           39.795    0.002
PDRB per kapita      0.042    0.471
Inflasi              0.004    0.983
IPM                 -0.408    0.018
Pengangguran         0.323    0.076
```


:::

```{.python .cell-code}
print(f"R-squared = {model.rsquared:.3f}")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
R-squared = 0.055
```


:::
:::

:::

**Membaca hasil:** **tanda koefisien** = arah pengaruh (mis. koefisien negatif pada IPM ŌćÆ
makin tinggi IPM, makin rendah kemiskinan); **p-value < 0,05** ŌćÆ pengaruh signifikan; **R┬▓**
= proporsi variasi yang dijelaskan model. *R┬▓ yang rendah pada model sederhana ini justru
wajar* ŌĆö data panel sering butuh **efek tetap** (*fixed effects*) atau **regresi spasial**
(lihat buku). Itulah gunanya *reproducible*: ganti model, render ulang, bandingkan.

## 4. Geostatistik

Data spasial punya pesan tambahan: **apakah daerah miskin mengelompok?** Kita petakan
sebarannya, lalu uji **autokorelasi spasial** dengan **Moran's I**.

### Peta tematik (choropleth) {.unnumbered}

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(sf); library(maptiles); library(tidyterra)
geo <- st_transform(st_read("data/jateng.geojson", quiet = TRUE), 3857)
peta <- merge(geo, df23, by = "wilayah", all.x = TRUE)
latar <- get_tiles(peta, provider = "OpenStreetMap", zoom = 8, crop = TRUE)
ggplot() + geom_spatraster_rgb(data = latar) +
  geom_sf(data = peta, aes(fill = kemiskinan), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "OrRd", direction = 1, name = "Kemiskinan (%)") + theme_void()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Sebaran kemiskinan kabupaten/kota, 2023 (R)](analisis_files/figure-html/map-r-1.png){width=768}
:::
:::

### Python

::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
import geopandas as gpd, contextily as ctx
g = gpd.read_file("data/jateng.geojson")
pmap = g.merge(df23, on="wilayah", how="left").to_crs(3857)
ax = pmap.plot(column="kemiskinan", cmap="OrRd", legend=True, alpha=0.85,
               edgecolor="white", linewidth=0.3, figsize=(8, 4.2))
ctx.add_basemap(ax, source=ctx.providers.OpenStreetMap.Mapnik)
ax.set_axis_off(); plt.show()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Sebaran kemiskinan kabupaten/kota, 2023 (Python)](analisis_files/figure-html/map-py-1.png){width=768}
:::
:::

:::

### Autokorelasi spasial ŌĆö Moran's I {.unnumbered}

Moran's I positif & signifikan ŌćÆ daerah dengan nilai serupa **berdekatan** (mengelompok).

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(spdep)
nb <- poly2nb(peta)                 # ketetanggaan (queen contiguity)
w  <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W")     # bobot spasial
mt <- moran.test(peta$kemiskinan, w)
cat(sprintf("Moran's I = %.3f (p = %.4f)", mt$estimate[1], mt$p.value))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Moran's I = 0.106 (p = 0.1194)
```


:::
:::

### Python

::: {.cell}

```{.python .cell-code}
from libpysal.weights import Queen
from esda.moran import Moran
w = Queen.from_dataframe(pmap, use_index=False); w.transform = "r"
mi = Moran(pmap["kemiskinan"].values, w)
print(f"Moran's I = {mi.I:.3f} (p = {mi.p_sim:.4f})")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Moran's I = 0.106 (p = 0.1210)
```


:::
:::

:::

**Tafsir:** bila Moran's I positif & signifikan, kemiskinan **mengelompok secara spasial**
ŌĆö ada "kantong" kemiskinan. Lanjutkan dengan **LISA** (klaster lokal) dan **regresi
spasial** bila perlu (lihat buku, bab *Statistik Spasial*).

## Selanjutnya
